Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2 &Title = 'IMPRESSÃO LANÇAMENTO FRETE' Header &titulo = UPPER(&Title) print Cabecalho End
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where FrtCod = &FrtCod
print CabecaFrete
print Valores
Exit
EndFor
//Imprime as Notas &IsAchou = false For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod, FrtItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where FrtCod = &FrtCod Where FrtItmNot = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &TipoFrete = 'SAIDA - FRETE CIF / Pedido/Notas do Frete' if &IsAchou = false print Notas EndIF
If FrtNfeCod > 0 &NotaPedido = 'N' &Filial = FrtNfeFilCod &CodNotaPedido = FrtNfeNum localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call('N', FrtItmNot, EmpCod, FrtPedFiLCod, FrtNfeFilCod, FrtNfeCod, FrtNfeCod, FrtNfeNum, FrtTraCod, FrtItmCte, FrtItmTip, FrtDtaLct, &PedCliCodRaz, &Status, &IsgridErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &grid2NfePedCod, &grid2PedFilCod, &grid2NfeCod, &CotObs, &CotVlr, &CotTraCodRaz, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado) &FrtNfeFilCod = FrtNfeFilCod &FrtNfeCod = FrtNfeCod Do 'BuscaNotaPedido' Else &NotaPedido = 'P' &Filial = FrtPedFiLCod &CodNotaPedido = FrtPedCod localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call('P', FrtItmNot, EmpCod, FrtPedFiLCod, FrtNfeFilCod, FrtPedCod, FrtNfeCod, FrtNfeNum, FrtTraCod, FrtItmCte, FrtItmTip, FrtDtaLct, &PedCliCodRaz, &Status, &IsgridErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &grid2NfePedCod, &grid2PedFilCod, &grid2NfeCod, &CotObs, &CotVlr, &CotTraCodRaz, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado) &FrtPedFiLCod = FrtPedFiLCod &FrtPedCod = FrtPedCod Do 'BuscaPedido' EndIf
&IsAchou = true print NotasItem EndFOr
//Imprime as Notas &IsAchou = false For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod, FrtItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where FrtCod = &FrtCod Where FrtItmNot = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &TipoFrete = 'ENTRADA - FRETE FOB / Pedido/Notas do Frete' if &IsAchou = false print Notas EndIF
If FrtNfeCod > 0 &NotaPedido = 'N' &Filial = FrtNfeFilCod &CodNotaPedido = FrtNfeNum localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call('N', FrtItmNot, EmpCod, FrtPedFiLCod, FrtNfeFilCod, FrtNfeCod, FrtNfeCod, FrtNfeNum, FrtTraCod, FrtItmCte, FrtItmTip, FrtDtaLct, &PedCliCodRaz, &Status, &IsgridErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &grid2NfePedCod, &grid2PedFilCod, &grid2NfeCod, &CotObs, &CotVlr, &CotTraCodRaz, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado) &FrtNfeFilCod = FrtNfeFilCod &FrtNfeCod = FrtNfeCod Do 'BuscaNotaPedido' Else &NotaPedido = 'P' &Filial = FrtPedFiLCod &CodNotaPedido = FrtPedCod localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call('P', FrtItmNot, EmpCod, FrtPedFiLCod, FrtNfeFilCod, FrtPedCod, FrtNfeCod, FrtNfeNum, FrtTraCod, FrtItmCte, FrtItmTip, FrtDtaLct, &PedCliCodRaz, &Status, &IsgridErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &grid2NfePedCod, &grid2PedFilCod, &grid2NfeCod, &CotObs, &CotVlr, &CotTraCodRaz, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado) &FrtPedFiLCod = FrtPedFiLCod &FrtPedCod = FrtPedCod Do 'BuscaPedido' EndIf
&IsAchou = true print NotasItem EndFOr
if &totPedVlrFrt > 0 and &totCotVlr > 0 &totPercentualCobrado = (&totPedVlrFrt / &totCotVlr) * 100 Endif
if &totPedCnhVlr > 0 and &totPedVlrLiq > 0 &TotPercentual = ((&totPedCnhVlr * 100)/&totPedVlrLiq) EndIf
Print TotalNotas
Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'BuscaPedido' &TipoFreteRed = '' &TipoFreteSai = ''
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FrtPedFiLCod Where PedCod = &FrtPedCod
&TipoFreteRed = Substr(trim(PedTipFrt.EnumerationDescription()), 1, 1) &TipoFreteSai = Substr(trim(PedTipSaiFrt.EnumerationDescription()), 1, 1)
&PedVlrFrt = PedVlrFrt &PedCnhVlr = PedCnhVlr &PedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq &PedCliEntUfeCod = PedCliEntUfeCod &PedCliEntCidNom = PedCliEntCidNom &Percentual = 0 if &PedCnhVlr > 0 and &PedVlrLiq > 0 &Percentual = ((&PedCnhVlr * 100)/&PedVlrLiq) EndIf &PercentualCobrado = 0 if &PedVlrFrt > 0 and &CotVlr > 0 &PercentualCobrado = (&PedVlrFrt / &CotVlr) * 100 Endif
&TotPedVlrFrt += &PedVlrFrt &TotPedCnhVlr += &PedCnhVlr &TotPedVlrLiq += &PedVlrLiq &totPercentualCobrado += &PercentualCobrado &TotPercentual += &Percentual &totCotVlr += &CotVlr Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'BuscaNotaPedido' &TipoFreteRed = '' &TipoFreteSai = ''
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod,NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FrtNfeFilCod Where NfeCod = &FrtNfeCod &FrtPedCod = NfePedCod &PedFilCod = NfeFilCod exit EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &PedFilCod Where PedCod = &FrtPedCod
&TipoFreteRed = Substr(trim(PedTipFrt.EnumerationDescription()), 1, 1) &TipoFreteSai = Substr(trim(PedTipSaiFrt.EnumerationDescription()), 1, 1)
&PedVlrFrt = PedVlrFrt &PedCnhVlr = PedCnhVlr &PedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq &PedCliEntUfeCod = PedCliEntUfeCod &PedCliEntCidNom = PedCliEntCidNom &Percentual= 0 if &PedCnhVlr > 0 and &PedVlrLiq > 0 &Percentual = ((&PedCnhVlr * 100)/&PedVlrLiq) EndIf
&PercentualCobrado = 0 if &PedVlrFrt > 0 and &CotVlr > 0 &PercentualCobrado = (&PedVlrFrt / &CotVlr) * 100 Endif
&TotPedVlrFrt += &PedVlrFrt &TotPedCnhVlr += &PedCnhVlr &TotPedVlrLiq += &PedVlrLiq &totCotVlr += &CotVlr Exit EndFor EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Doc.: N - Nota Fiscal P - Pedido

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão desnecessária deste documento!
